title: Absolute Cinema MP
description: A vanilla friendly ModPack aimed at making Minecrafts visuals more cinematic! With more immersive environments, and reactive effects this ModPack turns Minecraft into a cinematic experience!
body:
A simple modpack aimed at making the visual experience of the game more cinematic! From mods that add more emersion to stunning landscapes and lively bioms, this mod pack is a great base for someone looking to enhance minecrafts cinematic experience!

This modpack was originally made for one of my videos. Some mods and shader settings were changed for the video and may look different. I hope you enjoy
